mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly job growth (PAYEMS) indicates robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in high PAYEMS growth periods fall below median baseline returns (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth (GDPC1) above 3% signals strong economic demand, increasing corporate profitability and equity valuations, which predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns in high GDPC1 growth periods show no significant outperformance relative to baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPIAUCSL increase above 2.5% triggers inflationary concerns, prompting monetary tightening that reduces equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in high CPIAUCSL periods exceed 0.5% despite the signal (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) indicates robust economic expansion, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate earnings and investor confidence.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in co-expansion periods show no significant positive correlation with the combined GDPC1-INDPRO signal (Rank IC < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly UNRATE decline below 4.5% signals a tightening labor market, increasing wage pressures and prompting monetary policy tightening that reduces S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns in low UNRATE periods exceed 0.3% despite the signal (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production (INDPRO) indicates weakening supply-side capacity, reducing corporate profitability and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns in INDPRO decline periods show no significant negative correlation (Rank IC < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in FEDFUNDS and declines in UNRATE signal conflicting monetary and labor market signals, creating uncertainty that reduces S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in policy-conflict periods show no significant negative correlation (Rank IC < 0.05).
